overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a character exploring a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis at night. The scene transitions from street-level neon-lit sidewalks with food vendors to elevated catwalks and finally to a high-rise rooftop surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level food vendor area with neon signage

events.description: character begins moving along the sidewalk away from the food stall
character transitions from walking to running along the street

agents.ego_description: character wearing a conical hat moves from the food stall along the sidewalk, then breaks into a run down the street

entered.detail: food vendor stall with glowing purple neon trim and glass display cases showing merchandise
traditional red paper lanterns strung across the street on wires
tall towers with illuminated windows and holographic signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, with a character standing beside a food stall illuminated by purple neon lights. Red paper lanterns hang overhead as the character begins walking, then running, along the concrete sidewalk past cardboard boxes and futuristic storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with flying vehicle traffic

events.description: moving from enclosed sidewalk into open intersection with view of towering skyline
camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: camera moves through the intersection and pans upward to admire the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and passing flying vehicles

notable_agents.action: flying car with green underglow passes by at street level

entered.detail: curved concrete overpass structure with vehicles traveling on the upper deck
cluster of skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection surrounded by massive glass towers covered in neon advertisements. A flying vehicle with glowing green accents passes by as the camera pans upward, revealing the immense scale of the futuristic cityscape against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath the elevated highway structure
passing a burning trash barrel providing flickering orange light

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the covered walkway beneath the massive concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away down the corridor

entered.detail: massive elevated highway casting deep shadows over the walkway below
shops with green glowing signage and metal security shutters
metal barrel with open fire providing warm orange light and smoke

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, illuminated by green neon storefront signs. The concrete pillars of the overpass create a corridor effect as the camera passes a burning trash barrel, with a lone distant figure visible walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated maintenance catwalks and stairwells between buildings

events.description: ascending metal stairs to elevated catwalk above street level
descending narrow stairwell between industrial buildings
entering narrow interior corridor with hanging red lantern

agents.ego_description: climbs metal stairs to an elevated walkway, crosses above the city streets viewing the traffic below, then descends through a narrow passage

entered.detail: elevated walkway with metal grating floor and safety rails overlooking the street
building facade with shifting rainbow-colored neon panels visible from the elevated position
steep industrial staircase with metal railings descending between building walls
single large red paper lantern hanging in a narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends to an elevated metal catwalk with grating floors, offering a view down to the streets below and a distinctive rainbow-colored building. It then descends industrial stairs through a narrow corridor marked by a hanging red lantern, transitioning between the exterior and interior spaces of the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop with HVAC equipment surrounded by neon advertisements

events.description: emerging from corridor onto open rooftop with city views
navigating around large HVAC units and ventilation equipment

agents.ego_description: traversing the high-rise rooftop, moving past ventilation equipment and satellite dishes while surrounded by towering neon billboards

entered.detail: large industrial air conditioning units and ventilation equipment scattered across the roof
massive illuminated advertisements covering nearby skyscrapers with bright pink and cyan light
large cylindrical ducts and piping running across the rooftop surface
large parabolic communication dishes and antennae

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a high-rise rooftop surrounded by massive neon billboards and holographic advertisements. The camera navigates past industrial HVAC units, ventilation ducts, and satellite dishes on metal grating walkways, with steam rising from vents and the glow of pink and cyan neon reflecting off the wet surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from the rain-slicked streets of a neon-lit metropolis to the industrial heights of a high-rise rooftop. It begins beside a purple-lit food stall under red lanterns, moving rapidly along a concrete sidewalk past futuristic storefronts before opening into a wide intersection dominated by massive glass towers and a passing flying vehicle. As the camera pans upward to reveal the cityscape, the scene shifts back down into a corridor of concrete pillars beneath an elevated highway, passing a burning trash barrel and green neon signs. The perspective then climbs onto an elevated metal catwalk with views of a rainbow-colored building before descending through a narrow corridor marked by a red lantern. Finally, the camera emerges onto a rooftop surrounded by holographic advertisements and towering billboards, navigating past steaming vents and industrial HVAC units reflecting pink and cyan light.
